creator: cuqerr@gmail.com
text:
[66/147] Extracting font-arabic-misc-1.0.3_4: 100%                                pkg: sqlite error while executing COMMIT TRANSACTION  in file pkgdb.c:1293: database is locked                                                                      [67/147] Installing font-winitzki-cyrillic-1.0.3_4...                             pkg: sqlite error while executing BEGIN IMMEDIATE TRANSACTION  in file pkgdb.c:1293: cannot start a transaction within a transaction


This is the error I got when I did "pkg install xorg" on my Raspberry Pi 0
I ran the same command again and it worked.

uname -a: FreeBSD Pi_Zero_BSD 12.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE r354233 RPI-B  arm
